name: @auths/x402-adapter
description: Testnet-flagged x402/USDC settle MCP server — wraps an x402 facilitator on base-sepolia and returns the SettlementResponse + PaymentRequirements the auths-mcp gateway extracts the metered cost (maxAmountRequired, atomic USDC → cents) from and meters into the SAME cross-rail cap as Stripe (AGENT-PAY-2, PRD §11 bound-don't-build). LIVE settle needs a funded base-sepolia USDC testnet wallet + facilitator — a key alone does NOT cover x402.
